docs.title: nhentai
docs.text: A Python library to download nhentai galleries with optional manga translation and PDF export.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Parallel downloads with configurable worker threads
  • Translation via NekoTranslate, with automatic proxy rotation for anonymous use
  • PDF export — compile a gallery into a single file
  • Type-safe Engine and Language enums with full IDE autocomplete
  • CLI — usable without writing code

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
pip install git+https://github.com/decryptable/nhentai.git

With optional extras:

# PDF support
pip install "nhentai[pdf] @ git+https://github.com/decryptable/nhentai.git"

# SOCKS proxy support
pip install "nhentai[socks] @ git+https://github.com/decryptable/nhentai.git"

# Everything
pip install "nhentai[all] @ git+https://github.com/decryptable/nhentai.git"

docs.title: Quick start
docs.text:
from nhentai import NHentai, Downloader

gallery = NHentai("639456")
print(gallery.title["pretty"])

dl = Downloader(gallery, output_dir="./downloads")
paths = dl.download()

See Getting Started for more examples.

docs.title: 0.1.0 — 2026-03-26
docs.text:
Initial release.

  • NHentai — gallery metadata via nhentai HTML scraping
  • Downloader — parallel page download, optional translation, optional PDF export
  • NekoTranslator — NekoTranslate API client with automatic proxy rotation
  • Engine / Language — type-safe str enums
  • CLI via nhentai command

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: pip install "nhentai[all] @ git+https://github.com/decryptable/nhentai.git"

docs.title: Basic download
docs.text:
from nhentai import NHentai, Downloader

gallery = NHentai("639456")          # accepts URL or bare ID
print(gallery.title["pretty"])
print(f"{gallery.num_pages} pages, {gallery.num_favorites} favorites")

dl = Downloader(gallery, output_dir="./downloads", workers=8)
paths = dl.download()
print(f"Saved {len(paths)} pages to {paths[0].parent}")

docs.title: With translation
docs.text:
Translation uses NekoTranslate. Anonymous mode is free but quota is per-IP. The library scans proxies automatically to find one with remaining credits.

from nhentai import NHentai, Downloader, NekoTranslator, Engine, Language

gallery = NHentai("639456")
translator = NekoTranslator()        # anonymous, auto proxy

dl = Downloader(
    gallery,
    output_dir="./downloads",
    translator=translator,
    translate_lang=Language.INDONESIAN,
    translate_engine=Engine.DEEPL,
)
paths = dl.download()

docs.title: Authenticated
docs.text: translator = NekoTranslator(token="YOUR_BEARER_TOKEN")

docs.title: Export to PDF
docs.text:
pdf_path = dl.download(make_pdf=True)[0]
print(f"PDF saved to {pdf_path}")

PDF export requires Pillow. Install with pip install nhentai[pdf].

docs.title: CLI
docs.text:
# Download only
nhentai 639456

# Translate to Indonesian
nhentai 639456 --translate --lang id

# Translate and export PDF
nhentai 639456 --translate --lang id --pdf

# Custom engine, output directory, and workers
nhentai 639456 --translate --engine google_cloud -o ./manga -w 8

docs.title: Engines
docs.text: Enum Value Name Auth required Engine.GOOGLE google_cloud Google Translate No Engine.DEEPL deepl DeepL No Engine.AUTO auto Auto-select No Engine.DEEPSEEK deepseekv31 DeepSeek-V3.1 Yes Engine.GPT5_MINI gpt5_mini GPT-5 mini Yes Engine.CLAUDE claude45_sonnet Claude Sonnet 4.5 Yes Engine.GPT5 gpt5 GPT-5 Yes

docs.title: Modules
docs.text: Module Description NHentai Fetch and parse gallery metadata Downloader Download pages with optional translation and PDF export NekoTranslator NekoTranslate API client Engine / Language Type-safe enums for engine and language selection CDN CDN URL builder Grabber Low-level HTTP fetcher Parser HTML parser for gallery JSON

docs.title: CDN
docs.text: Builds nhentai CDN image URLs. Host is selected randomly from the pool on each call.

docs.title: nhentai.cdn.CDN
docs.text: Builds nhentai CDN image URLs with random host selection for load balancing.

docs.text: Full-resolution page URL.

docs.title: get_thumb_url(media_id: int, page: int, ext: str = 'webp') -> str
docs.text: Thumbnail URL for a specific page.

docs.title: get_cover_url(media_id: int, ext: str = 'webp') -> str
docs.text: Cover image URL.

docs.title: ext_from_type(t: str) -> str staticmethod
docs.text: Convert nhentai page type code (j/p/w/g) to file extension.

docs.title: Downloader
docs.text:
Downloads pages from a gallery with optional per-page translation and PDF export.

from nhentai import NHentai, Downloader, NekoTranslator, Engine, Language

gallery = NHentai("639456")

# Download only
dl = Downloader(gallery, output_dir="./downloads", workers=8)
paths = dl.download()

# Download + translate + PDF
translator = NekoTranslator()
dl = Downloader(
    gallery,
    output_dir="./downloads",
    translator=translator,
    translate_lang=Language.INDONESIAN,
    translate_engine=Engine.DEEPL,
)
pdf = dl.download(make_pdf=True)

If a page fails to translate, the original image is saved instead (silent fallback).

docs.title: nhentai.downloader.Downloader(gallery: NHentai, output_dir: str | Path = '.', workers: int = 4, translator: NekoTranslator = None, translate_lang: Language | str = Language.ENGLISH, translate_engine: Engine | str = Engine.DEEPL, timeout: int = 30)
docs.text:
Downloads pages from an :class:NHentai gallery, with optional translation and PDF export.

:param gallery: Parsed gallery object. :param output_dir: Root directory for downloads. Gallery pages go into <output_dir>/<gallery_id>/. :param workers: Number of parallel download threads. :param translator: Optional :class:NekoTranslator. If provided, each page is translated before saving. :param translate_lang: Target language for translation. :param translate_engine: Engine to use for translation. :param timeout: Per-request timeout in seconds.

docs.title: download(make_pdf: bool = False) -> list[Path]
docs.text:
Download all pages. Returns a list of saved file paths (or a single PDF path if make_pdf=True).

:param make_pdf: Compile pages into a PDF after downloading. Requires Pillow. :raises DownloadError: If a page fails to download. :raises RuntimeError: If make_pdf=True but Pillow is not installed.

docs.title: nhentai.downloader.DownloadError
docs.text:
Bases: Exception

Raised when a page download fails.

docs.title: Enums
docs.text:
Engine and Language are str subclasses, so they work transparently as plain strings in any context (requests, JSON, str comparisons).

from nhentai import Engine, Language

# Both forms are valid anywhere an engine/language is accepted
Engine.DEEPL == "deepl"          # True
Language("id") is Language.INDONESIAN  # True

# IDE autocomplete works on all members
Engine.GOOGLE
Engine.DEEPL
Engine.AUTO
Engine.DEEPSEEK
Engine.GPT5_MINI
Engine.CLAUDE
Engine.GPT5

Language.ENGLISH
Language.INDONESIAN
Language.JAPANESE
# ... and 30+ more

docs.title: nhentai.enums.Engine
docs.text:
Bases: StrEnum

Translation engine. Free tier: GOOGLE, DEEPL, AUTO. Higher tiers require a token.

docs.title: nhentai.enums.Language
docs.text:
Bases: StrEnum

ISO 639-1 target language codes supported by NekoTranslate.

docs.title: Grabber
docs.text: Low-level HTTP client with nhentai-compatible headers. Used internally by NHentai, but available if you need raw HTML or image bytes.

docs.title: nhentai.grabber.Grabber(url: str, timeout: int = 30, headers: dict | None = None)
docs.text:
Fetches raw HTML or image bytes from a URL with nhentai-compatible headers.

:param url: Target URL. :param timeout: Request timeout in seconds. :param headers: Additional headers merged with defaults.

docs.title: get_html() -> str
docs.text:
Fetch and return the HTML of :attr:url.

:raises ConnectionError: On HTTP error, timeout, or network failure.

docs.title: download_bytes(url: str) -> bytes
docs.text:
Download and return raw bytes from url.

:raises ConnectionError: On HTTP error, timeout, or network failure.

docs.title: NHentai
docs.text:
Fetches and exposes metadata for a single nhentai gallery.

Accepts either a full URL or a bare gallery ID:

from nhentai import NHentai

gallery = NHentai("639456")
gallery = NHentai("https://nhentai.net/g/639456/")

docs.title: nhentai.nhentai.NHentai(url: str)
docs.text:
Fetches and exposes metadata for a single nhentai gallery.

Accepts either a full URL (https://nhentai.net/g/639456/) or a bare gallery ID ("639456").

:param url: Gallery URL or numeric ID string. :raises ConnectionError: If the page cannot be fetched. :raises ValueError: If gallery data cannot be parsed.

docs.text:
Parse and return the gallery info dict from the embedded window._gallery script.

:raises ValueError: If the script tag is missing or JSON is malformed.

docs.title: NekoTranslator
docs.text:
Client for the NekoTranslate API.

Anonymous mode uses free per-IP quota and rotates proxies automatically. Pass a token for authenticated (higher-quota) requests.

from nhentai import NekoTranslator

# Anonymous — scans proxy list for available quota
translator = NekoTranslator()

# Authenticated
translator = NekoTranslator(token="YOUR_BEARER_TOKEN")

# Custom proxy source
translator = NekoTranslator(
    proxy_list_url="https://example.com/proxies.txt"
)

# Explicit proxy list
translator = NekoTranslator(
    proxies=["socks5://1.2.3.4:1080", "1.2.3.4:8080"]
)

# Translate a file — returns raw bytes
data = translator.translate_file("page.jpg", tgt_lang="id", engine="deepl")

# Translate raw bytes
data = translator.translate_bytes(image_bytes, filename="page.jpg", tgt_lang="id")

# Check balance
info = translator.get_balance()
# {"email": None, "plan": "Free", "level": 0, "quota": 12}

docs.title: nhentai.translator.NekoTranslator(token: str | None = None, proxy_list_url: str | None = None, proxies: list[str] | None = None)
docs.text:
NekoTranslate API client.

Anonymous (no token): uses free quota per IP, rotates proxies automatically. Authenticated: pass token from nhentai.net localStorage.

:param token: Bearer token for authenticated requests (optional). :param proxy_list_url: URL to a plain-text proxy list. Defaults to proxifly socks5 list. :param proxies: Explicit proxy list (overrides proxy_list_url).

docs.title: find_proxy_with_quota() -> dict | None
docs.text: Returns the first proxy with remaining anonymous quota, or None.

docs.title: get_balance() -> dict
docs.text: Returns {"email", "plan", "level", "quota"}.

docs.title: translate_file(image_path: str | Path, tgt_lang: Language | str = Language.ENGLISH, engine: Engine | str = Engine.DEEPL) -> bytes
docs.text:
Translate an image file and return the result as bytes.

:param image_path: Path to the source image. :param tgt_lang: Target language (Language enum or ISO code string). :param engine: Translation engine (Engine enum or string). :raises FileNotFoundError: If image_path does not exist. :raises TranslationError: On API rejection or failure. :raises ConnectionError: On network issues.

docs.title: translate_bytes(data: bytes, filename: str, tgt_lang: Language | str = Language.ENGLISH, engine: Engine | str = Engine.DEEPL) -> bytes
docs.text:
Translate raw image bytes. Writes to a temp file, translates, returns result bytes.

:param data: Raw image bytes. :param filename: Used only to determine file extension.

docs.title: nhentai.translator.TranslationError
docs.text:
Bases: Exception

Raised when the NekoTranslate server reports a translation failure.
